title: Allow Editors on Private Boards to Invite Existing Users

posts.author: AmyM (Amy Morrow)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Our organization manages 40K+ private boards derived from a few standardized templates, with about 900 users accessing only the boards related to their current engagements.

For governance and reporting consistency, users cannot be Board Owners. We want them to remain Editors, but Editors cannot currently invite existing account users to Private boards. This creates heavy admin overhead because each board’s user list changes frequently.

Requested Enhancement: Allow Editors on Private boards to add existing account users, without granting them ownership or permission to modify board settings or templates.

What are you trying to achieve

Expected Benefits:
*Significantly reduces admin workload across thousands of boards
*Ensures timely access for engagement teams
*Preserves controlled templates and standardized reporting

In short: Editors need the ability to add existing users on Private boards to support scalable, efficient collaboration without compromising governance.
